## Why
- [ ] This change directly improves token reduction and/or safe adoption

## Mandatory metric block (No metric, no merge)
```text
Input tokens~: <x>
Output tokens~: <y>
Reduction: <z>%
Runtime overhead: <t>
```

## Safety checks
- [ ] No debug-signal regression observed
- [ ] No new secret exposure risk
- [ ] CI (fmt/clippy/test) is green
- [ ] Aligns with docs/PRODUCT_GUARDRAILS.md
